<?php /** * ReadBytes trait * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2015 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\System\SSH\Common\Traits; /** * ReadBytes trait * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ trait ReadBytes { /** * Read data * * @param int $length * @throws \RuntimeException on connection errors */ public function readBytes($length) { $temp = fread($this->fsock, $length); if (strlen($temp) != $length) { throw new \RuntimeException("Expected $length bytes; got " . strlen($temp)); } return $temp; } }
